subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my glorious Lord, thanks be unto Thee, O my mighty God, for having opened wide the gates of forgiveness with the keys [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لک یا ربی الجلیل شکرا لک یا ربی العظیم علی ما فتحت ابواب الغفران بمقالید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom
